text:
These are the 3, 4, and 5 man tablebases for crafty, with the
exception of the pawn tablebases, which are quite large.  A future
port will address those seperately.

X
X
X
XThese tablebases do not include the pawn tablebases, which are quite
Xlarge.  This port alone will eat up around 2G. The pawn ending
Xtablebases will need to be installed with the
Xgames/crafty-tablebase-pawn port, if you really want them.
X
XBe warned that both ports together will eat up around 7.1 Gigs of your
Xdisk space, or 14.2G if you don't delete the distfiles. (I highly
Xrecommend doing this, as these files almost never change).
X
XSERIOUSLY CONSIDER doing 'rm ${DISTFILES}/crafty/*.emd' as root when
Xyou have installed all of the tablebases you're going to want.
X
XTo make use of the tablebases, something like the following should be
Xadded to your ~/.craftyrc file:
X
X	egtb
X	cache 12M
END-of-crafty-tablebase-no-pawn/pkg-message

Xyou are truly blessed with disk space, you may also want to install
Xthe games/crafty-tablebases-pawns port.
X
XBe warned that all of these togther will eat up around 7.1 Gigs of
Xyour disk space, or 14.2G, if you don't delete the distfiles (I highly
Xrecommend doing this, as these files almost never change).
X
X// J Shoemaker
END-of-crafty-tablebase-no-pawn/pkg-descr
